description.value: JAN3 is a Bitcoin infrastructure company led by Samson Mow that develops AQUA, a self-custodial wallet integrating on-chain Bitcoin, the Lightning Network, the Liquid Network and stablecoins in one app. AQUA uses Layer 2 technologies and submarine swaps to move between Lightning and Liquid efficiently, with a focus on Latin America and emerging markets. It lets users send and receive Bitcoin and USDt while keeping control of their funds.
